Description: Hoe hoe hoe!
Actual Requirements: Craft a wooden, stone, iron, gold or diamond hoe

Description: Plant down a sapling
Crunch into an apple
Use shears to obtain leaf blocks
Use shears to pick up short grass or ferns
Actual Requirements: Obtain either Short Grass, Fern, Short Dry Grass, Tall Dry Grass

Description: Get a deadbush cause you're a noob
Collect some Bushes

Advancement Name: You can't take the sky from me
Description: Obtain a Firefly Bush
Plant down all types of saplings
Plant a Mangrove Propagule in a Grove biome
Craft and eat a normal golden apple
Eat an Apple every day for 30 in-game days
Actual Requirements:
The day counter increments when the player eats an apple on a day that they haven't eaten an apple yet.
Every sunrise, it will check if at least one apple was eaten in the previous day. If there wasn’t, it will reset the day counter for apples.
If there was, it resets the apple eaten scoreboard, meaning the player will need to eat another apple on this day

Description: Pick and eat some sweet berries
Get stuck in a sweet berry bush. Oh, icky yucky goo!
Actual Requirements: Enter a sweet berry bush block

Description: Gather both types of mushroom
Actual Requirements: Obtain a red and brown mushroom

Description: Slurp some mushroom stew
Notes: Known as "Mushroom, mushroom, mushroom, mushroom!" until 1.9

Description: Grow a giant mushroom and then harvest it with silk touch
Actual Requirements: Obtain a red or brown or stem mushroom block

Description: Slurp some suspicious stew and pray you don't suddenly see giant flying eyeballs in the sky
Slurp every kind of suspicious stew
Actual Requirements:
Eat Suspicious Stew with the following flowers added: Oxeye Daisy, Cornflower, Lily of the Valley, Wither Rose, any Tulip, Allium, Poppy, Closed Eyeblossom, 
either Blue Orchid or Dandelion, and either Azure Bluet or Open Eyeblossom

Description: Harvest some sugar cane from a river or ocean
Obtain some ink from hunting a squid
Hunt enough Squids to collect a stack of Ink Sacs
Use a book, ink and a feather to craft a book and quill
Finish writing in your book or get a book from another player
Collect some kelp from an ocean
Craft a dried kelp block for use as a great fuel source
Craft a stack of dried kelp blocks
Eat nothing but dried kelp for three in-game days
Actual Requirements: Eat dried kelp once; in the following three in-game days, eat nothing but dried kelp.

Description: Break down a cactus in a desert
Run into a cactus
Actual Requirements: Take damage from touching a cactus

Description: Plant a seed and watch it grow
Actual Requirements: Place wheat, melon, pumpkin, beetroot, nether wart or torchflower seeds, or a pitcher pod

Description: Beetroot soup gives you souperpowers!
Grow wheat and use it to bake bread
Wheat, sugar, milk and eggs!
Craft a stack of hay blocks
Eat 100 slices of cake
Obtain some cocoa beans from a jungle
Bake some cookies... and then scoff them all yourself
Plant some cocoa in the nice steamy Nether
Actual Requirements: Place cocoa beans in the Nether

Description: Harvest some spooky pumpkins
Bake a pumpkin pie
Do you want to build a snow golem?
Notes: Known as "Do you want to build a snowman?" until 1.9

Description: Shear the Pumpkin off of a Snow Golem to unveil their true face
Carve a stack of pumpkins

Advancement Name: The Melon! The Melon! The Melon!
Description: Eat a melon. Be careful not to drop it over a cliff
Craft 9 melon slices back into a block that, when broken, will probably not give you all 9 slices back
Parent: The Melon! The Melon! The Melon!
Notes: Known as "Breaking the law of conservation of matter" until 1.9

Description: Craft a stack of melon blocks
Squash and eat a potato
Actual Requirements: Eat a potato or baked potato

Description: Eat a poisonous potato
Eat 100 Poisonous Potatoes
Eat a golden carrot
Craft a composter using wooden slabs then place it
Fill up a composter
Use bone meal to grow a sapling into a tree
Actual Requirements: This advancement is awarded when the sapling actually turns into a tree

Description: Use bone meal on everything that can be grown
Actual Requirements:
Use Bone Meal on:Bone meal does NOT need to be used on blocks that randomly grow a spread of plants (e.g. Grass, Nylium, Moss, underwater blocks to get Seagrass, etc)
Known bug: Red Mushrooms, Brown Mushrooms, Azaleas, Flowering Azaleas and Mangrove Propagules only count if you bone-meal them but they don't immediately grow. 
This is due to how the item_used_on_block trigger works and can't be fixed, but bear this in mind.

Description: Compost every type of compostable item in a Composter
Plant every single type of crop on farmland
Actual Requirements: Plant wheat seeds, beetroot seeds, melon seeds, pumpkin seeds, carrots, potatoes, torchflower seeds and pitcher pod

Description: Completely use up a diamond hoe, and then reevaluate your life choices
Notes: Refusing to change since snapshot 20w20a (1.10 Beta Build 10)

Description: Fill both your hunger bar and saturation level
Actual Requirements: Both your hunger level and saturation level must be 20

Description: Eat every type of fruit, vegetables, and any sort of plant matter
Actual Requirements:
Eat the following foods: Apple, Mushroom Stew, Bread, Golden Apple, Notch Apple, Melon, Carrot, Potato, Baked Potato, Poisonous Potato, Golden Carrot, 
Pumpkin Pie, Chorus Fruit, Beetroot, Beetroot Soup, Dried Kelp, Suspicious Stew, Sweet Berries, Honey Bottle, Glow Berries, Cookie

Description: Eat every type of meat, even if uncooked or rotten
Eat everything that is edible, even if it's not good for you
Actual Requirements: Eat every food required for Vegetarian and Meat Lovers

Description: Obtain a full stack of all the foods
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of every food required for "Vegetarian" and "Meat Lovers" except for Enchanted Golden Apples
